title: Camping Life Lokta Paper
description: For the dad who loves the great outdoors, from the child subjected to it – wrap up their Father’s Day gift in reusable gift wrap inspired by camping.

images.alt: Camping Life. A square sheet of gift wrapping Lokta paper. The design consists of different sizes of squares and rectangles containing different illustrations including a tent, campfire, mountains, bird, binoculars, compass and more.

The image shows a blurred background of a wooden-slatted wall and a "LUSH" green triangle flag. The foreground shows the Camping Life Lokta wrapping paper tied neatly around a bath bomb-sized gift and tied with twine.

The image shows the model sitting down in beige and khaki clothing with the 70's Ties knot wrap as a neck scarf. They are holding the Camping Life-wrapped gift in their hands as they begin to open it.
